title: StablecoinX bets on Ethena ecosystem with Nasdaq debut on Friday
message_html: StablecoinX bets on Ethena ecosystem with Nasdaq debut on Friday ...
snippet: USDe circulating supply has shrunk by 70% since the October bull market peak, when it topped $14 billion.

title: Sharplink buys Ethereum for first time in 8 months, adding 5,000 ETH
message_html: Sharplink buys Ethereum for first time in 8 months, adding 5,000 ETH ...
snippet: The buy came days after a group of former Ethereum Foundation researchers launched Ethlabs, a nonprofit Sharplink helped fund.
